relevant_products.rationale: Complete multivitamin/mineral with chelated minerals, CoQ10, alpha-lipoic acid. Covers the foundational micronutrient gaps identified in 65+ population (zinc, selenium, magnesium, B-vitamins).
High-quality whey protein isolate for sarcopenia prevention. 15 g protein per portion. Can be consumed as meal replacement or supplement between meals for elderly with reduced appetite.
Omega-3 for anti-inflammatory support, cardiovascular health, and cognitive function in aging. High concentration EPA/DHA. Third-party tested for purity.
Antioxidant protection for aging cells. Mixed carotenoids from natural sources (tomato, spirulina, broccoli). Supports eye health (macular degeneration prevention) and immune function.
Basic bone health and mineral support for elderly. Lower dose than standalone products but useful as maintenance. Chewable form aids adherence for those with swallowing difficulties.
Circulation support, blood pressure management. Relevant for elderly cardiovascular health but not a core 65+ recommendation.
Joint health support for aging population. 1500 mg glucosamine sulphate. Suitable for elderly with osteoarthritis concerns.
Alternative multivitamin for second household member, dairy-free. Useful for elderly with lactose intolerance.

summary: NeoLife has strong product coverage across all major 65+ nutritional needs: multivitamin (Pro Vitality), protein (Golden Home Care), omega-3 (Omega-3 Plus), antioxidants (Carotenoid Complex), minerals (Cal-Mag-Zinc), and joint support (Glucosamine). Golden Home Care is uniquely valuable as a dual-purpose product (protein supplementation + nutrient delivery) for elderly with reduced appetite.
